description: municipal seat of Acapulco, State of Guerrero, Mexico
description_wiki: Acapulco de Juárez (Spanish: [akaˈpulko ðe ˈxwaɾes] ), commonly called Acapulco ( AK-ə-PUUL-koh, US also  AHK-; Nahuatl languages: Acapolco), is a city and major seaport in the state of Guerrero on the Pacific Coast of Mexico, 380 kilometres (240 mi) south of Mexico City.

aliases: Free and Sovereign State of Guerrero
description_wiki: Guerrero, officially the Free and Sovereign State of Guerrero, is one of the 31 states that compose the 32 Federal Entities of Mexico.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: municipal seat of Juárez, State of Chihuahua, Mexico
description_wiki: Ciudad Juárez (US:  sew-DAHD HWAR-ez; Spanish: [sjuˈðað ˈxwaɾes] ; "Juárez City"), commonly referred to as just Juárez (Lipan: Tsé Táhú'ayá), is the most populous city in the Mexican state of Chihuahua.

description: city in and county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States
description_wiki: El Paso (English:  ; Spanish: [el ˈpaso] , lit. 'the route' or 'the pass') is a city in and the county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States.

description: consolidated city-county and capital of Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Denver  (  DEN-vər) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Colorado.
Mexico, officially the United Mexican States, is a country in North America.

description: global chain of hamburger fast food restaurants headquartered in Florida, United States
description_wiki: Burger King Corporation (BK, stylized in all caps) is an American fast food chain of hamburger fast food restaurants, headquartered in Miami-Dade County, Florida.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Arizona is a landlocked state in the Southwestern United States, sharing the Four Corners region with Colorado, New Mexico, and Utah.

description: city and county seat of Bernalillo County, New Mexico, United States and the largest city in the state
description_wiki: Albuquerque, also known as ABQ, Burque, Duke City, is the most populous city in the U.S. state of New Mexico, and the county seat of Bernalillo County.

description: city in the state of Texas, United States
description_wiki: Dallas is a city in the U.S. state of Texas.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Arkansas ( , AR-kən-saw) is a landlocked state in the West South Central region of the Southern United States.
